params.context: qianwen_sse v5: h2_mode changed 2→0 (RST_STREAM DISABLED). Previous #523/#525 showed APF blocks correctly and sends envelope (1405B H2), but browser sees net::ERR_FAILED because RST_STREAM terminates connection before SSE body is parsed. v5 removes RST_STREAM — only END_STREAM (delayed 10ms) terminates the stream cleanly. Template unchanged (v4, 1148B). CORS https://qianwen.com.

check_details.key_hypothesis: RST_STREAM caused net::ERR_FAILED → 消息生成失败. Without RST_STREAM, browser should parse SSE body normally.
